name: Henderson Consumer Law
description_short: San Diego-based consumer law firm specializing in debt collection defense and debtor representation. Currently not accepting new clients.
description_long: Henderson Consumer Law is a San Diego-based law firm focused on representing individual consumers in legal disputes against businesses, with particular emphasis on debt collection defense matters. The firm operates out of San Diego, California and maintains a focused practice serving consumers who face aggressive collection actions and debtor-creditor disputes. Their website indicates specialization in defending consumers against debt collectors and businesses pursuing collection claims, positioning themselves as advocates for debtors navigating the court system. The firm is currently closed to new client intake, accepting only communications from current or former clients through their listed phone number and mailing address. This closure suggests either capacity constraints or a transition period in their practice operations.
address: 185 F St suite 100-j, San Diego, CA 92101

company_info.headquarters: 185 F St suite 100-j, San Diego, CA 92101

pros: Specializes specifically in debt collection defense, a critical need for consumers facing collection suits
San Diego-based with local court experience in California consumer law
Provides direct phone contact for existing client matters (760-575-4594)
Clearly identifies as consumer advocate representing individuals against businesses
Maintains professional office infrastructure with mailing address for client communication
Focuses on debtor defense, protecting consumers' rights in collection disputes
cons: Currently not accepting new clients, making the firm inaccessible to prospective consumers
Minimal online presence and limited website content provides little detail about experience, credentials, or case outcomes
No information about attorney qualifications, years in practice, or specific expertise areas
No pricing information, fee structures, or payment options disclosed on website
No client testimonials, case results, or track record information available for evaluation
best_for: Consumers with existing relationships facing debt collection lawsuits in San Diego area
Individuals defending against aggressive debt collector claims in California courts
Current clients requiring ongoing debtor defense representation
diagnosis: Henderson Consumer Law is appropriate only for existing or former clients of the firm seeking debt collection defense in the San Diego area, as the firm is not currently accepting new clients. The primary caveat is accessibility—prospective consumers cannot engage this firm's services.
services: Legal defense for consumers in court proceedings
